temporal_ordering_evidence.evidence_boundary: Sanitized timestamp-only internal record evidence; this is not external preregistration.

rule_type: stress-focused powered internal replication under a frozen observed-step rule
statistical_unit: independent realization with an independently seeded trajectory population and measurement-noise draw

power_design.purpose: Test the measurement-noise stress row at a realization count exceeding the prior floor-power design check.

decision_predicate.per_scenario_estimate: mean observed-step position RMSE over independent realizations
decision_predicate.paired_gap: RGR-GF observed-step position RMSE minus the best classical observed-step position RMSE in the same realization
decision_predicate.confidence_interval: 95% percentile bootstrap CI over independent realizations
decision_predicate.learned_positive: RGR-GF must be the lowest-mean method for the stress scenario and the upper endpoint of the paired-gap CI must be strictly below zero
decision_predicate.stress_negative_floor_power_readout: If RGR-GF does not satisfy the learned-positive predicate at K=96, the stress-row negative has been checked at a realization count exceeding the K about 94 floor-power requirement; this does not convert the record into external preregistration or public-reference validation.
decision_predicate.reference_metric_use: all-step position RMSE is reported only as a propagation-dominated reference and is not part of the decision predicate

seed_disjointness: base seed 991117 is disjoint from the 41-55 training/validation cohort, model-selection validation splits, the observed-step endpoint-fixation base seed 770000, the K=32 replication base seed 880000, the scenario-resampling base seed 90000, and prior endpoint-extension shard seeds 770539-770566
interpretation_boundary: This rule defines an internal stress-focused powered replication fixed before the K=96 draw was evaluated. It is not an external preregistration, does not permit selection, tuning, or retraining, and supports only the observed-step stress-row ordering inside the compact simulator.
